title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that allows non-engineers to build software through conversational interaction. The platform gained millions of users within two months of launch. It is built using Claude and represents an approach to AI-powered software development that emphasizes trust and user experience.
